etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "nirvana" from Sanskrit "nirvāṇa" (extinction, blowing out)

etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Extinction blowing → transcendent bliss → contemporary nirvana transcendent and nirvana bliss with transcendent presence
